_calibration_notes.method: Manual pixel-to-normalised-coordinate mapping from uploaded floor plan PNGs
_calibration_notes.store_2_png_dims: 960 x 1280 px (portrait, L-shaped store with BOH upper-right)
_calibration_notes.normalisation: Each polygon vertex = (x_px / img_width, y_px / img_height)
_calibration_notes.verification: Polygons visually verified against PNG landmarks — brand wall positions, Makeup Unit centroid, Cash Counter footprint, Entrance arc

STORE_BLR_001.CAM_1: Skincare wall — top-left brand shelves (Farmstay, TFS, Minimalist, Aqualogi). Wide-angle, facing south.
STORE_BLR_001.CAM_2: Cosmetics/Makeup floor — center-right (L'Oreal, Mars, Lakme, Maybelline wall units). Wide-angle, facing south.
STORE_BLR_001.CAM_3: Entrance / FOH door — fisheye top-down, captures entry threshold and the glass-door tripwire.
STORE_BLR_001.CAM_5: Billing / Cash Counter — oblique angle, captures POS desk and ACCESS corner.

STORE_BLR_002.CAM_4: BOH (Back of House) — storeroom with carton boxes, barrels, makeup artist chair. Staff-only zone. FOH cameras TBD.

CAM_1.description: Skincare wall — top-left brand bay (Farmstay / TFS / Minimalist / Aqualogi / Foxtal / JC)

SKINCARE_WALL.description: Top wall brand shelves: Salm, TFS, Minimalist, Aqualogi, Foxtal, JC

FOH_LEFT.description: Left half of FOH walking area visible from CAM_1

FRAGRANCE_NAIL_UNIT.description: Fragrance + Nail counter island (center-left floor fixture)

CAM_1._tripwire_note: Removed: tripwires are only valid on entry cameras (CAM_3). Floor cameras do not count footfall crossings.

CAM_2.description: Cosmetics/Makeup floor — center-right (Loreal, Mars, Lakme, Maybelline, Faces Canada, Swiss Beauty)

COSMETICS_WALL.description: Bottom wall brand bays: Facia, Mars+Nybae, Mens, Loreal, Beaut — and top visible wall: Loreal, Alps, 6Mars, Swiss Beauty, Lakme, Faces Canada, Maybelline

MAKEUP_UNIT.description: Makeup Unit island — double chair unit (900mm x 900mm per plan)

FOH_RIGHT.description: Right half of FOH walking area visible from CAM_2

CAM_2._tripwire_note: Removed: tripwires are only valid on entry cameras (CAM_3). Floor cameras do not count footfall crossings.

CAM_3.description: Entrance — glass door, Purplle branded fascia, top-down fisheye. Tripwire = door threshold.

ENTRANCE.description: Entrance threshold zone (skewed top-down trapezoid due to fisheye lens)

LOBBY.description: Just-inside lobby area — first ~1.5m after entry door

CAM_5.description: Cash Counter / Billing — right wall. Also captures ACCESS corner (accessories display).

CASH_COUNTER.description: POS desk + barcode scanner area. Staff always present here.

BILLING.description: Alias of CASH_COUNTER used by ingestion pipeline for funnel stage 3

ACCESS_CORNER.description: ACCESS display — accessories / impulse buys corner (teal box on floor plan)

BACKROOM.description: Narrow staff-only corridor behind Cash Counter
